message:
Fix table.rs doctests and style.rs doc link

- Update table module doctests to use correct API (with_column instead
  of add_column, add_row_cells instead of Row::new().cell())
- Fix broken intra-doc link in style.rs (make_ansi_codes -> Self::make_ansi_codes)
- Both doctests now pass, cargo doc builds without warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
